subject: [CDS] Improve BlueprintsProcessor credentials management
commit_message:
[CDS] Improve BlueprintsProcessor credentials management

- Removes hardcoded credentials from templates and config files.
- Creates a shared secret which can be used by all components.
- Move healthCheck credentials to values so they can be overrided,
  ideally these should also be generated using api-credentials
  but that will require code changes.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3284
Signed-off-by: Jozsef Csongvai <jozsef.csongvai@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I41563150f174787bce2c78e5a18af2862e55f87d
